name: Tasty Maritime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Haddock fillets; frozen, cooked (700g)(1 1/2 lbs)
2 cups Tomatoes; peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
Note: Boston bluefish, cod or turbot may be substituted for Haddock.
Break fillets into chunks. Sauté onion, garlic and zucchini until vegetables are tender. Blend in flour, seasonings and herbs. Add tomatoes and cook 5 minutes or until sauce is thick. Add fish and pour into a 9 inch pie plate. Cover with pastry; trim and flute. Bake at 200°C (400°F) for 25 to 30 minutes or until pastry is golden brown. Allow pie to stand for 10 minutes before serving.
